channel.title: Projects on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Home

item.title: Ecommerce ELT Pipeline
item.description: Build-up the data infrastructure using generated data crafted to mirror real-world data from leading tech companies. Data pipeline, data modelling, data viz.

item.title: Text Analytics Using TF-IDF for Identifying Regulatory Alignment in Indonesia's Investment Sector
item.description: The project originated from the need to assess the harmony between various legislations, an important aspect given the complexity and frequent revisions in regulations.

item.title: RAWG ETL
item.description: This is a data engineering project that focuses on analyzing the latest six months of game data from the website Rawg.io using their provided API.

item.title: EmoJournal - Speech Emotion Recognition
item.description: EmoJournal is an android app that helps users to analyze an individual’s speech patterns, to identify signs of mental health problems based on their emotion.
